name: CaptureFlags
regularDescription: Specifies the type of data to be captured:

values.name: wrm
values.regularDescription: Session recording file.

values.name: session_log
values.disabledDescription: Exclude keyboard inputs from session logs (including SIEM)

values.name: wrm
values.disabledDescription: Exclude keyboard inputs from recorded sessions

values.name: wrm
values.disabledDescription: disable clipboard log in recorded sessions

values.name: meta
values.disabledDescription: disable clipboard log in recorded meta

values.name: wrm
values.disabledDescription: disable (redirected) file system log in recorded sessions

values.name: meta
values.disabledDescription: disable (redirected) file system log in recorded meta

name: ColorDepth
regularDescription: Specifies the maximum color depth for the client connection session:

values.name: depth8
values.regularDescription: 8-bit

values.name: depth15
values.regularDescription: 15-bit 555 RGB mask

values.name: depth16
values.regularDescription: 16-bit 565 RGB mask

values.name: depth24
values.regularDescription: 24-bit RGB mask

values.name: depth32
values.regularDescription: 32-bit RGB mask + alpha

values.name: SIEM
values.regularDescription: message sent to SIEM

name: ServerCertCheck
info: Internal errors, such as failure to access a known certificate or decode it, always result in connection rejection.

values.name: fails_if_no_match_or_missing
values.regularDescription: Fails if the certificate is missing or does not match the known certificate.

values.name: fails_if_no_match_and_succeed_if_no_know
values.regularDescription: Fails if the certificate does not match the known certificate; succeeds if no certificate exists.

values.name: succeed_if_exists_and_fails_if_missing
values.regularDescription: Succeeds if a certificate exists (verification skipped); fails if no certificate exists.

values.name: always_succeed
values.regularDescription: Always succeeds without performing certificate validation.

name: TraceType
info: When session records are encrypted, they can be read only by the WALLIX Bastion where they have been generated.

values.name: localfile
values.regularDescription: No encryption (faster).

values.name: localfile_hashed
values.regularDescription: No encryption, with checksum.

values.name: cryptofile
values.regularDescription: Encryption enabled.

values.name: unmasked
values.regularDescription: Log all input in plain text.

values.name: password_only
values.regularDescription: Log all input but mask passwords (without Session Probe, input is not logged).

values.name: password_and_unidentified
values.regularDescription: Log all input but mask passwords and unidentified input (without Session Probe, input is not logged).

values.name: fully_masked
values.regularDescription: Do not log input.

name: SessionProbeOnLaunchFailure
regularDescription: Behavior on failure to launch Session Probe.

values.name: ignore_and_continue
values.regularDescription: Proceed without Session Probe. Metadata collection is considered non-essential, and user experience is prioritized. The session will start in best-effort using 'Launch fallback timeout' instead of 'Launch timeout'.

values.name: disconnect_user
values.regularDescription: (recommended) End the session. A successful launch is expected when all technical prerequisites are met, reliability is prioritized. Adapt 'Launch timeout' value to the target performance.

values.name: retry_without_session_probe
values.regularDescription: Attempt to reconnect without Session Probe. This restores legacy behavior. The session will start using 'Launch fallback timeout' instead of 'Launch timeout'.

values.name: delayed
values.regularDescription: Clipboard processing is deferred and, if necessary, the token is left with the client.

values.name: duplicated
values.regularDescription: When 2 identical requests are received, the second is ignored. This can block clipboard data reception until a clipboard event is triggered on the target server when the client clipboard is blocked, and vice versa.

values.name: continued
values.regularDescription: No special processing is done, the proxy always responds immediately.

name: ColorDepthSelectionStrategy
regularDescription: Color depth for the Session Recording file (.wrm):

values.name: depth24
values.regularDescription: 24-bit

values.name: depth16
values.regularDescription: 16-bit

name: WrmCompressionAlgorithm
regularDescription: Compression method of the Session Recording file (.wrm):

values.name: gzip
values.regularDescription: GZip: Files are better compressed, but this takes more time and CPU load.

values.name: snappy
values.regularDescription: Snappy: Faster than GZip, but files are less compressed.

name: RdpCompression
regularDescription: Specifies the highest RDP compression support available

values.name: none
values.regularDescription: The RDP bulk compression is disabled

values.name: rdp4
values.regularDescription: RDP 4.0 bulk compression

values.name: rdp5
values.regularDescription: RDP 5.0 bulk compression

values.name: rdp6
values.regularDescription: RDP 6.0 bulk compression

values.name: rdp6_1
values.regularDescription: RDP 6.1 bulk compression

values.name: latin
values.regularDescription: Recognizes Latin characters

values.name: cyrillic
values.regularDescription: Recognizes Latin and Cyrillic characters

values.name: ignore_and_continue
values.regularDescription: Proceed without Session Probe. Minimizes impact on user experience if Session Probe is unstable. Not recommended when Session Probe is working well. May be exploited by attackers simulating Session Probe failure to bypass surveillance.

values.name: disconnect_user
values.regularDescription: Legacy behavior. Prioritizes security but impacts user experience. RDP session may close (resulting in the permanent loss of all its unsaved elements) if the 'End disconnected session' parameter (or an equivalent setting at the RDS-level) is enabled.

values.name: freeze_connection_and_wait
values.regularDescription: (recommended) Block user actions until contact with the Session Probe is restored (e.g., reply to KeepAlive). Ensures session integrity during Session Probe outages.

values.name: disable
values.regularDescription: When replaying the session video, the content of the RDP viewer matches the size of the client's desktop.

values.name: v1
values.regularDescription: When replaying the session video, the content of the RDP viewer is restricted to the greatest area covered by the application during the session.

values.name: v2
values.regularDescription: When replaying the session video, the content of the RDP viewer is fully covered by the size of the greatest application window during the session.

values.name: allow
values.regularDescription: Forward Console mode request from client to the target.

values.name: force
values.regularDescription: Force Console mode on target regardless of client request.

values.name: forbid
values.regularDescription: Block Console mode request from client.

values.name: jab
values.disabledDescription: disable Java Access Bridge. General user activity monitoring in the Java applications (including detection of password fields).

values.name: msaa
values.disabledDescription: disable MS Active Accessbility. General user activity monitoring (including detection of password fields). (legacy API)

values.name: msuia
values.disabledDescription: disable MS UI Automation. General user activity monitoring (including detection of password fields). (new API)

values.name: edge_inspection
values.disabledDescription: disable Inspect Edge location URL. Basic web navigation monitoring.

values.name: chrome_inspection
values.disabledDescription: disable Inspect Chrome Address/Search bar. Basic web navigation monitoring.

values.name: firefox_inspection
values.disabledDescription: disable Inspect Firefox Address/Search bar. Basic web navigation monitoring.

values.name: ie_monitoring
values.disabledDescription: disable Monitor Internet Explorer event. Advanced web navigation monitoring.

values.name: group_membership
values.disabledDescription: disable Inspect group membership of user. User identity monitoring.

values.name: never
values.regularDescription: Never store transferred files.

values.name: always
values.regularDescription: Always store transferred files.

values.name: on_invalid_verification
values.regularDescription: Store transferred files only if file verification fails. Requires ICAP file verification (in section file_verification).

name: SessionProbeOnAccountManipulation
regularDescription: For targets running WALLIX BestSafe only.

values.name: allow
values.regularDescription: User action will be accepted.

values.name: notify
values.regularDescription: (Same thing as 'allow'.)

values.name: deny
values.regularDescription: User action will be rejected.

name: ClientAddressSent
regularDescription: Client Address to send to target(in InfoPacket)

values.name: proxy
values.regularDescription: Send proxy client address or target connection.

values.name: front
values.regularDescription: Send user client address of front connection.

values.name: Fatal
values.regularDescription: Severe error events that will likely cause the application to abort.

values.name: Error
values.regularDescription: Error events that may allow the application to continue running.

values.name: Info
values.regularDescription: General informational messages about application progress.

values.name: Warning
values.regularDescription: Potentially harmful situations that require attention.

values.name: Debug
values.regularDescription: Detailed informational events intended for debugging.

values.name: Detail
values.regularDescription: More detailed informational events than Debug for in-depth analysis.

values.name: Auto
values.regularDescription: The language is determined based on the keyboard layout specified by the client.

values.name: Restart
values.regularDescription: Restart Session Probe. May result in session disconnection due to loss of KeepAlive messages! Refer to 'On keepalive timeout' parameter of current section and 'Allow multiple handshakes' parameter of 'Configuration options'.

values.name: Stop
values.regularDescription: Stop Session Probe. May result in session disconnection due to loss of KeepAlive messages! Refer to 'On keepalive timeout' parameter of current section.

values.name: windows_management_instrumentation
values.regularDescription: Get command-line of processes via Windows Management Instrumentation. (Legacy method)

values.name: windows_internals
values.regularDescription: Calling internal system APIs to get the process command line. (More efficient but less stable)

values.name: both
values.regularDescription: First use internal system APIs call, if that fails, use Windows Management Instrumentation method.

values.name: Supported
values.regularDescription: Windows

values.name: UnsupportedOrUnknown
values.regularDescription: Bastion, xrdp, or others
